texto: This was shaping up to be the worst conference call of my life, even worse than that time I accidentally clogged the school toilet back in the first grade with my Boba Fett figure (I was pretending it was the Sarlaac pit).
explicacao: Citação de Rick Gualtieri sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “This was shaping up to be the worst conference call of my life, even worse than that time I accid…” articula reflexao, humorous, shaping em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como termino e reflexao.
